overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting movement through a shallow river and along a grassy meadow path with a prominent snow-capped mountain backdrop. The scene transitions from a forested river valley to an open alpine meadow with dramatic cloud formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river flowing through forested valley

events.description: white horse visible on left riverbank briefly before moving out of frame
approaching the river's edge to exit the water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water moving downstream between tree-lined banks

notable_agents.action: white horse standing on the grassy riverbank then moving away into the trees

entered.detail: shallow flowing river with visible stones and gentle current
dense pine trees lining the right riverbank
lush green vegetation growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view wading through a shallow river in a forested valley. A white horse stands briefly on the left bank before disappearing. The camera moves steadily forward through the water, flanked by dense coniferous forests on the right and open banks on the left, approaching the river's edge to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow at river's edge with emerging mountain views

events.description: exits the river onto the grassy riverbank
snow-capped mountain becomes visible on the left as the camera pans slightly

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank through tall grass with the mountain coming into view

entered.detail: large mountain with snow-covered peak and rocky slopes emerging from behind the tree line
tall green grass and wildflowers covering the riverbank
narrow dirt trail forming along the riverbank through the grass

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the river onto a grassy meadow bank, transitioning from the enclosed waterway to open terrain. As the view widens, a majestic snow-capped mountain emerges on the left horizon. The character continues walking along a forming dirt path through the tall grass, with the forest now receding to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with prominent mountain backdrop

events.description: game UI prompt 'Pick and Examine' appears briefly in bottom right corner indicating an interactable object
path curves slightly to the right as the trail winds through the meadow

agents.ego_description: following the winding dirt path through the open meadow with the mountain visible to the left

entered.detail: small boulders and stones scattered along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a winding dirt path through an open alpine meadow. The snow-capped mountain dominates the left side of the frame, appearing closer as the camera advances. A brief game UI prompt appears suggesting an interaction opportunity. The path curves gently through the grassland, with scattered rocks visible along the trail edges and the forest now behind the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a secluded forested river valley into a vast, open alpine meadow. It begins by wading through the shallow waters of a river, passing a white horse on the left bank while flanked by dense coniferous forests. As the camera exits the waterway onto a grassy bank, the enclosed environment opens up to reveal a majestic snow-capped mountain emerging on the left horizon. The scene then shifts to a winding dirt path through tall grass, with the forest receding to the right as the mountain grows more dominant in the frame. Finally, the camera advances along the curving trail past scattered rocks, leaving the woods behind to fully enter the expansive highland landscape.
